overall.description: First-person motorcycle ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player travels from covered highways through industrial waterfront districts to neon-lit commercial areas, ending in an industrial zone with smokestacks. The weather is overcast with wet roads reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway with red structural beams

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through covered highway with red structural beams overhead

entered.detail: metal roof structure covering the highway with gaps showing sky
red painted structural beams lining the highway
red metal safety railings along the road edge
highway signs suspended from the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person motorcycle ride through a covered urban highway. Red structural beams and metal roofing create a semi-enclosed environment. The road is multi-lane asphalt with barrier railings, and the lighting is predominantly artificial from overhead fixtures.

events.description: enters darker tunnel section with neon security sign visible on left wall
exits tunnel into brighter industrial area with visible sky

agents.ego_description: navigating a right curve through the tunnel while maintaining speed

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
illuminated red neon sign reading SECURITY on the tunnel wall
linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a darker tunnel section with concrete walls and a prominent red neon security sign. The camera navigates a right curve before exiting into a brighter industrial area, marking a transition from the covered highway to the open waterfront district.

events.description: enters Arasaka Waterfront industrial district with concrete retaining walls

agents.ego_description: cruising along the industrial waterfront road with palm trees visible on the left

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall running along the right side of the road
large industrial buildings with metal siding and loading docks
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the street
metal walkway bridge crossing over the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the Arasaka Waterfront industrial district, characterized by concrete retaining walls on the right and industrial warehouses on the left. Palm trees line the street, and an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the road ahead. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural dusk and artificial streetlights.

events.description: enters Northside commercial district with vibrant neon signage and shop fronts
stops at red traffic light behind a yellow sports car

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit commercial district and stopping at a traffic light behind a yellow sports car

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car stopped at red light ahead of the player

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with ground floor shops and upper level windows
bright neon signs advertising various businesses and shops
circular illuminated sign for Chrome Rock establishment
elevated walkway with stairs connecting both sides of the street
suspended traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to the Northside commercial district, filled with neon-lit storefronts and moderate pedestrian activity. The player drives past various shops with bright signage, including a prominent Chrome Rock sign, before stopping at a red light behind a yellow sports car. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone with smokestacks and power lines

events.description: enters Kabuki district with industrial smokestacks and power transmission towers visible
stops at intersection behind black SUV waiting at traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial streets with smokestacks in the distance, navigating turns and stopping at traffic lights

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at traffic light ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke visible in the distance
large metal electrical transmission towers with power lines
industrial factory structures with corrugated metal walls
elevated highway or monorail track crossing over the road
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to the Kabuki industrial district, dominated by distant smokestacks and power transmission towers. The player drives past factory buildings and under an overhead highway bridge. The environment is more open with wider streets, and the segment ends with the player stopping at a traffic light behind a black SUV.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride that transitions from a claustrophobic covered highway into the expansive, neon-lit industrial and commercial districts of the city. It begins beneath red structural beams and metal roofing on a multi-lane asphalt road, moving through a dark tunnel marked by a red neon security sign before curving right to exit into the open air. As the camera emerges into the Arasaka Waterfront, the environment opens up with concrete retaining walls, palm trees, and industrial warehouses under a mix of dusk and artificial light. The scene then shifts into the Northside commercial district, where the lighting becomes saturated with bright neon storefronts and signage like Chrome Rock, eventually slowing to a stop behind a yellow sports car at a red light. Finally, the ride progresses into the Kabuki industrial district, passing under an overhead highway bridge toward a wide-open landscape of distant smokestacks and power towers before coming to a halt behind a black SUV.
